bird.name: 紅翅黑鸝
bird.summary: 紅翅黑鸝（學名：Agelaius phoeniceus，英文名：red-winged blackbird），亦作紅翅烏鶇、美洲红翼鸫，是黑鸝屬的一種鳥類，主要分布於北美洲。分有多個族群，北部的族群在冬季飛往南部過冬，此外在薩爾瓦多西部、洪都拉斯西北部和哥斯達黎加西北部有獨立的族…

locations.name: 北美洲
locations.summary: 北亞美利加洲（英語：North America；字源：亞美利哥·維斯普奇），簡稱北美洲，位於西半球北部（或北半球）。東臨大西洋，西臨太平洋，北瀕北冰洋，南以巴拿馬運河為界與南美洲劃分。北美洲還包括加勒比海中眾多島嶼（主要為西印度群島）。北…

locations.name: 中美洲
locations.summary: 中美洲（英語：Central America，西班牙語：América central）是一個地理概念。依據不同的劃分法，屬於北美洲或南美洲的一部分，一般指連接北美洲與南美洲之間的地峽，現有七個國家（若算入墨西哥則為八個）。 範圍 範圍北…

locations.name: 湿地
locations.summary: 濕地（wetland）是永久或季節性被较浅的水（少于6米的淡水、半咸水或海水）掩蓋的獨特自然环境，是一種許多缺氧過程具有優勢的半水生生態系統，也是陸地生態系統和水域生態系統之間的過渡性地帶。有許多水生植物生長在土壤长期被水体浸泡的特定濕地…

locations.name: 草沼
locations.summary: 草沼即草本沼泽（英語：marsh），也叫草泽，是一种主要生长草本植物的湿地，多半可以發現在湖岸或河岸邊，介於水生與陸生生態系統的過渡，一般未被淹没，但土壤维持水浸状态。优势植物有苔草、莎草和灯芯草等，另外也會有低矮的灌木生長。和草沼不同，…

locations.name: Milan, Tennessee
locations.summary: Milan ( MY-lin) is the largest city in Gibson County, Tennessee, United States.

locations.name: 田纳西州
locations.summary: 田纳西州（英語：State of Tennessee），位于美国南方，首府及最大城市為納許維爾，是美國音樂聖地，也是美国乡村音乐的中心。其他著名城市还有孟菲斯、诺克斯维尔和查塔努加。美国2020年人口普查显示，田纳西州共有人口6,910,…

relations.subject: 紅翅黑鸝
relations.evidence: It generally prefers wetlands and inhabits both freshwater and saltwater marshes, particularly if cattail is present

relations.subject: 紅翅黑鸝
relations.evidence: It generally prefers wetlands and inhabits both freshwater and saltwater marshes, particularly if cattail is present

relations.subject: 紅翅黑鸝
relations.evidence: It is also found in dry upland areas, where it inhabits meadows, prairies, and old fields. In a large part of its distribution area, it constitutes the most abundant passerine bird in the swamps in which it nests. It is also present in areas without much water, where it inhabits open fields – often agricultural areas – and sparse deciduous forests. In the winter of 1975–1976, near Milan in western Tennessee, red-winged blackbirds were observed resting in a mixed roost that came to house 11 million individuals in January and early February in a plantation of 4.5 hectares of yellow pine (Pinus taeda) with little undergrowth

relations.subject: 紅翅黑鸝
relations.evidence: It generally prefers wetlands and inhabits both freshwater and saltwater marshes, particularly if cattail is present
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 紅翅黑鸝
relations.evidence: It generally prefers wetlands and inhabits both freshwater and saltwater marshes, particularly if cattail is present
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 紅翅黑鸝
relations.evidence: It is also found in dry upland areas, where it inhabits meadows, prairies, and old fields. In a large part of its distribution area, it constitutes the most abundant passerine bird in the swamps in which it nests. It is also present in areas without much water, where it inhabits open fields – often agricultural areas – and sparse deciduous forests. In the winter of 1975–1976, near Milan in western Tennessee, red-winged blackbirds were observed resting in a mixed roost that came to house 11 million individuals in January and early February in a plantation of 4.5 hectares of yellow pine (Pinus taeda) with little undergrowth
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 紅翅黑鸝
relations.evidence: During the breeding season, the density of breeding adults is much higher in swamps than in highland fields. Although the highest concentrations of nesting red-winged blackbird are found in swamps, most of them nest in upland habitats since they are much more abundant. In a study conducted in the Wood County, Ohio between 1964 and 1968, the density of territorial males in wetland habitat was found to be 2.89 times those in upland habitat
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
